name: Floor Zero — Game Development
description: Native Orbit development board derived from `shrezird/Floor-Zero`, audited at commit `0bcaa55c28d170cd3f57c53c6bb40f1c4cf4cf05` on 2026-07-18. Covers engine, mechanics, player, Entity AI, anomalies, story, levels, interactables, UI, audio/VFX, architecture, blockers, backlog, QA, release, and repository references. Critical finding: active main scene is the cinematic hallway/motel and does not assemble the navigation/anomaly/Entity/Exit hierarchy expected by the loop.

cards.title: Floor Zero: complete repository brief
cards.description: Audited `shrezird/Floor-Zero` `main` at `0bcaa55c28d170cd3f57c53c6bb40f1c4cf4cf05` on 2026-07-18. Single-player first-person analog/industrial horror: descend Floor 10→0, inspect repeating spaces, photograph anomalies, survive a sound-hunting Entity, and escape. Correct anomaly photos remove targets; false photos cost health; photographing the Entity displaces it but also costs health. Pillars: observation, risky evidence gathering, sound-as-stealth, unstable reality, and systemic audiovisual dread. Tags mean implemented=present, partial=incomplete, blocked=release-stopping, inferred=interpretation.

cards.title: Current build status
cards.description: **Pre-alpha systems/intro vertical slice.** Substantial player, Entity AI, anomaly logic, menu, intro, ending, shader, settings, audio, and transition code exists. The active `gameplay/levels/floor_zero/main.tscn` is primarily the cinematic hallway + motel and does not assemble the navigation map, production anomaly pool, Entity instance, or functional Exit expected by `main.gd`; the central floor loop is not connected end to end. Controls: WASD, Shift sprint, mouse look, RMB camera, LMB photo/interact, E interact, Escape pause, Space ending, X debug skip. Target preset: Windows x86_64/D3D12/embedded PCK.

cards.title: Engine, rendering, physics, and project configuration
cards.description: Godot Steam 4.7; Forward Plus; Jolt Physics; Windows D3D12; stretch `canvas_items` + `expand`; main scene `ui/main_menu/main_menu.tscn`; icon `assets/sprites/icon.svg`; black boot splash. Native stack: GDScript, `.tscn`, GLB/resources, CharacterBody3D, direct physics ray queries, NavigationAgent3D/NavigationServer3D, Tween, ConfigFile, AudioServer, threaded ResourceLoader, custom shaders. No addon framework, C#, GDExtension, or package manager identified. `CLAUDE.md` requires 4.7-only production-ready changes preserving paths/signals/architecture.

cards.title: Autoload, settings, and export
cards.description: `SceneLoader` autoload uses layer-100 fade overlay, rejects concurrent changes, threaded-loads PackedScenes, and recovers from failure. `GameSettings` stores sensitivity, Master volume, and supported keyboard binds in `user://settings.cfg`. Windows preset: x86_64, all resources, embedded PCK, S3TC/BPTC, no encryption/signing, shader baker off, output `../../Exports/Floor Zero.exe`; company/product/version/description fields blank; no other platform presets.

cards.title: Verified story sequence
cards.description: Intro camera crawls five hallway sections past family photos under “Floor Zero” while sad piano, answering-machine beep, voicemail, missing-family radio report, ringing phone, flicker, and police sirens build. Lightning cuts to protagonist waking in a rainy motel. He descends repeating anomalous floors. Ending: escape felt like years, but boss says only ~40 minutes passed; protagonist quits and drives until authorities detain him, confirm he told nobody, then apparently shoot and photograph him. Themes: repetition, missing family, temporal distortion, surveillance/evidence, secrecy, analog corruption, escape without safety.

cards.title: Narrative gaps and placeholder
cards.description: Motel phone system rings/answers once and displays yellow dialogue, but `DIALOGUE_LINES` is only `TEST`. Final caller, purpose, family connection, rule exposition, voice asset, and replay reset are missing. Canon still undefined: protagonist/family relationship; why he visits; nature/origin of Floor Zero and Entity; why photographs work; authority identity; meaning of final photograph; alternate endings. Keep interpretations labeled inferred until approved.

items.text: Replace TEST with final written dialogue
Reset phone correctly on new run
Write concise story bible and canonical timeline

cards.title: Run, objective, health, and progression
cards.description: `starting_floor=10`, `max_health=3`; successful exits decrement 10→0 and win after <0 (11 floors). `start_loop()` resets player, anomaly states, Entity, jukeboxes, HUD, fades, locks, dialogue. Floor10 has no anomalies; Floor9 guaranteed non-empty; later 30% empty or random 1–6. Correct photo: 2.5s cooldown, found tracking, capture cue, collision off, .8s dissolve. False photo: −1 heart, damage/noise/message, 5s cooldown. Exit succeeds only when found>=spawned; otherwise death.

cards.title: Entity encounter, death, victory, debug
cards.description: Below Floor10 Entity rolls 35% spawn. Photo stun teleports it after 2s, costs 1 heart, sets 6s cooldown; contact does 999 damage. Noise radii: walk5, sprint14, photo20, pipe20. At 0 health: pause, clear/hide Entity, show dynamic floor subtitle, Restart or Menu; restart returns Floor10/3 health without intro. Below Floor0 loads dedicated ending/credits. X skips menu cinematic, intro, floors, and ending; remove or debug-gate for release.

cards.title: Movement, stamina, view, interaction
cards.description: `CharacterBody3D`; walk3, sprint6, gravity10; body yaw + Head pitch ±1.5rad; sensitivity .002 from settings. Head bob 2.5/.05 plus randomized held-item sway; footstep pitch .8–1.2 at bob trough. Stamina100, drain25/s, recharge15/s after1s; default resume15 but main overrides 0. Reach RayCast target20; E interacts; LMB interacts when camera lowered by walking collider ancestors for `interact()`. No jump/crouch/lean/vault.

cards.title: Photography and critical availability blocker
cards.description: RMB raises/lowers held camera; LMB captures only fully raised/ready. Flash anim/audio/screen, radius20 noise, Main callback, recharge sound. Cooldowns: normal5, anomaly2.5, Entity6; crosshair red + radial progress. **P0:** `Item_Camera` is `visible=false`; `_camera_is_available()` uses `is_visible_in_tree()` and forcibly rejects raise/photo while hidden. No audited code shows it. Define unlock moment and preserve visibility through floor/reset/restart.

items.text: Show/unlock camera at approved story moment
Verify correct, false, and Entity photos

cards.title: AI state machine, detection, and movement
cards.description: States ROAMING/SEARCHING/HUNTING/TELEPORTING/VENTING; speeds2.2/3.3/4.8. NavigationAgent selects paths; Node3D root moves manually; model faces velocity/plays `Walking`. Suspicion max100, threshold40, decay4/s, proximity2.5 adding80/s; noise gain/localization error scale by distance (min1/close3/far10). Search lasts12s using eight expanding-ring points 1.5→7 by1.2; hunt lingers8s, decays slower, uses direct clear-ray movement within4 and chase audio.

cards.title: Echolocation, counterplay, traversal, presentation
cards.description: Every6–14s outside hunt: stop, echo, pause1.2, estimate player; perfect lock within4 unjammed, error to15 over24. Jukebox max10 charge/100s/radius28 pulls estimate and adds up to24 error. Door signals repath and toggle nav links. Blocked closed-door route triggers vent entry/exit selection,2s travel,6s cooldown, red active lights. Contact .8 instant-kills; camera stun flickers2s/teleports preferably≥6 away. Magenta/cyan dissolve, movement/attack/chase/echo/teleport audio, 3.5m environment aura and 12m VHS danger effect. Profile .2s full-scene mesh scans/manual Node3D collision/teleport placement.

cards.title: Anomaly architecture and capture
cards.description: Main expects `NavigationRegion3D/Map/Anomaly`. Pool children reset hidden/disabled, then selected visible/physics-enabled; detectable via `Anomaly` group or `is_anomaly`; require raycast body/Area and MeshInstance descendants. Manager handles shuffle/spawn/reset/found arrays/collision/dissolve. PhotoDetection casts nine 50-unit center/cardinal/diagonal rays, excludes player, Entity first, prioritizes unfound anomaly; capture copies albedo into glitch material, dissolves .8s, hides/disables.

cards.title: P0 — Production anomaly content missing
cards.description: Active main scene lacks required pool hierarchy, so spawning returns without content. `gameplay/levels/test_anomaly/test_anomaly.tscn` exists, but no production named catalog is assembled. For each final anomaly document normal reference, anomalous change, difficulty/floor weight, conflicts, collision root, dissolve meshes, intended framing/distance, false-positive risk, cues, performance, screenshots, and QA. Do not label generic props as confirmed anomalies until contracts are authored.

items.text: Validate raycast and dissolve on every anomaly

cards.title: Current environment and modular kit
cards.description: Active scene: Player + black/glow WorldEnvironment + five-section blue hallway + family photos/story audio + motel. Motel: striped walls/window lightning states, carpet/tiled ceiling, bed/mattress, TV, alcohol, fixtures, bathroom/entrance doors, phone, rain. Hallway beats: Floor Zero sign; developer sign; section4 TV/news/phone/flicker; section5 police lights/siren. Reusable kit includes blue/striped wall/door/window, wood/carpet floors, ceilings, boxes, frame, bed, fixture/fan, alcohol, TV, computer/server, pipe, camera, Entity.

cards.title: Interactables and navigation requirements
cards.description: Door: randomized open/close animation/audio, interactable group, state signal, nav link only open. Jukebox: repeated charge, pitch, echolocation decoy. Vent: A/B markers, green idle/red active. Pipe:10% hiss alerts Entity20. TV:7-color projected light +24Hz flicker. Phone: ring/answer placeholder. Exit: Area+collision+red TEMP “EXIT”, no script; Main Exit reference/connection commented. Final floor needs baked NavigationRegion, map center/extent, starts, doors/links, reachable vent markers, Entity, Exit, pool, collision-safe geometry.

cards.title: Menu, settings, pause, and transitions
cards.description: 3D server-room menu: camera sway, music, random mesh glitch, VHS, click/hover, Play/Settings/Quit. Play centers title/counts FLOOR ZERO→TEN with glitch/wave, opens door, camera markers, thunder,360° roll, fade/load; X skip. Settings moves camera to physical computer, projects UI to monitor with green CRT/light; shared settings controller. Pause toggles tree/cursor/VHS with Resume/Settings/Menu. Global fade/threaded loader; floor screen shows random thought + Descending to Floor N.

cards.title: HUD, ending, and accessibility gaps
cards.description: HUD: white/red/green ring crosshair + cooldown arc; fading red→green stamina ring; three layered hearts jitter more at low health; dialogue/cooldown/false-photo messages; green capture pulse; flash/damage/VHS. Game-over dynamic floor subtitle. Ending:8 Space slides, red/shaky styles, gunshot→capture, scrolling credits, return menu. Missing: FOV/graphics/fullscreen, audio categories, subtitles, bob/sway/shake/VHS reduction, photosensitivity/content warning, controller, color-independent states, rebind Interact/Photo/Raise.

cards.title: Visual identity and shader stack
cards.description: Analog industrial/motel horror: low-res pixelation, color quantization, VHS chroma/scanline/noise/jitter/vignette, cyan-magenta corruption, warm dirty light, red police/Entity accents, photos, diegetic CRT. `main.gdshader`; `dissolve.gdshader` 4-octave FBM/stepped slices/block warp/emissive edges/discard; `crt_ui_overlay`; `tv_error`; `noise`. Entity proximity within12 interpolates resolution .25→.12, chroma .003→.009, scanline .15→.35, noise .06→.28, jitter .004→.018.

cards.title: Audio inventory and mix review
cards.description: Player walk/hurt/flash/recharge/static/capture; Entity movement/attack/chase/echo/teleport; story sad piano/voicemail/beep/missing-family report/phone/police/rain/thunder; menu music/bootup; doors/pipe/jukebox/TV; UI click/hover/title/transition; ending music/gunshot/capture/credits. Dynamic pitch/state fades/spatialization; runtime 900Hz low-pass phone bus. Review Walk +24dB, static −30/pitch.5, phone −8 target, thunder range, clipping/attenuation, separate Music/SFX/Dialogue sliders, and licenses/credits.

cards.title: Architecture and runtime contracts
cards.description: `main.gd` orchestrates floor/health/reset/spawn/photo/interaction/death/exit/win/UI. RefCounted controllers: IntroSequenceController, AnomalyManager, PhotoDetection, EntityGlitchPresenter; EntityPresentation separates model/audio/material aura; GameSettings static; SceneLoader autoload. Groups: player/entity/main/door/vent/jukebox/player_interactable/Anomaly. Signals: player noise→Entity, door state→repath, transition done, intended Exit body_entered; Player calls parent `on_take_photo()`.

cards.title: Data flow and project support gaps
cards.description: Photo: input→Player flash/noise→Main→9-ray Entity/anomaly detection→stun/capture/damage. AI: noise/proximity/echo→suspicion/estimate→state→nav/manual movement, modified by doors/vents/jukebox/photo. Progression: reset/spawn→capture→Exit arrays→fade/decrement→floor screen→reset→ending. Legacy Player WinScreen appears unused versus dedicated ending. No README/GDD/story bible/catalog/automated tests/CI/license/asset attribution found; test anomaly scene and strict CLAUDE.md exist.

cards.title: Implemented versus partial
cards.description: Implemented: engine/export base, menu/play/settings, SceneLoader, hallway+motel intro, player movement/stamina/view, photo animation/detection code, health/HUD/death, Entity AI/audio/vents/jukebox counterplay, anomaly manager/dissolve, transitions, ending/credits, VHS stack. Partial: phone TEST, final anomaly catalog, current scene not floor map, temporary/disconnected Exit, incomplete settings/accessibility, release metadata/signing, story connective tissue, balance/mix/performance, legacy win overlay.

cards.title: Milestones and release classification
cards.description: Current: pre-alpha. Release-stopping disconnects: hidden camera; no active navigation floor, pool, Entity, integrated Exit; commented Exit connection. **Alpha:** complete Floor10→0 run with final pool/all systems connected. **Beta:** content complete, balanced, performant, accessible, export-verified. **RC:** regression, credits/licenses, metadata/signing, clean build/fresh install. Not release-ready.

cards.title: P0 — Assemble and connect the playable floor
cards.description: Create/restore NavigationRegion3D + Map + Anomaly pool, repeating geometry, baked navmesh, Entity, Exit, Player start, doors, vents, jukeboxes/props. Integrate with intro/motel or split deliberately without breaking paths. Restore typed Exit reference + exactly-once body_entered; replace TEMP marker; test all-found advance, missing-anomaly death, Floor0 ending. Explicitly unlock camera; author final pool; validate closed-door vent routes.

cards.title: P0/P1 — Narrative handoff, full run, state, release
cards.description: Replace phone TEST/final audio/subtitles/reset. Verify natural+skipped intro cleanup: gameplay camera, HUD, cursor, player processing, camera unlock, phone, floor. Complete menu→intro→Floor10→Floor9 anomaly→Entity floor→Floor0→ending→credits→menu without X. Review restart state: phone/doors/jukebox/Entity/anomaly materials/camera/audio/HUD tweens. Debug-gate X. Finalize Windows metadata/signing and clean-machine export.

cards.title: Content, balance, AI, progression decisions
cards.description: Write story bible/canon; final phone; named anomaly catalog with references/weights/conflicts; environmental clues. Playtest run/floor time, false-photo deaths, cooldown, counts/empty confusion, 35% Entity, speeds/suspicion/echo/vents/jukebox/stamina/range/contact/teleport. Decide save model: full-run reset vs intro checkpoint vs floor continue vs settings-only. Polish AI tells/fairness/recovery only after map is connected.

cards.title: UX, accessibility, performance, documentation, release
cards.description: Full rebind incl mouse/actions/controller/conflicts/defaults; FOV/fullscreen/resolution/quality; Music/SFX/Dialogue; subtitles; bob/sway/shake/VHS/photosensitivity options/warning; color-safe HUD; hold/toggle; profanity warning. Profile aura scene scans/materials/nav/menu/VHS4K/assets/audio/memory. Add README, architecture/anomaly/debug docs, license/attribution/credits, parser/scene/resource/export smoke tests, version/signing, clean Windows validation, media/store assets.

cards.title: Functional QA matrix
cards.description: Menu fresh/existing settings, resolutions, Play full/skip, settings/save, load failure. Intro audio/markers/photos/news/phone/police/thunder/wake/cleanup/skip. Player movement/collision/stamina/sensitivity/camera/pause/input conflict. Photos center/edges/occlusion/overlap/cooldowns/outcomes/dissolve/objective. Entity hearing/proximity/echo/jam/search/hunt/doors/vents/stun/kill/reset. Interactables charge/animation/reset. Progression Floor10/Floor9/empty/1/max/Entity/all-found/missing/death/restart/Floor0/ending.

cards.title: Compatibility and release gate
cards.description: Windows10/11 clean export; 1080p/1440p/4K/ultrawide/windowed; D3D12 start; frame pacing around aura/VHS; audio latency; threaded loads; memory menu→game→ending→menu; no missing imports. Gate: no parser/runtime errors, full run without X, all P0 done, no TEST/TEMP, fresh settings, accessibility/warnings approved, credits/licenses, metadata final, clean hardware pass, known issues documented.

cards.title: Key paths and tuning
cards.description: Paths: `project.godot`, `export_presets.cfg`, `core/settings/game_settings.gd`, `autoload/scene_loader/`, `gameplay/levels/floor_zero/main.gd|tscn|controllers/`, `gameplay/actors/player/`, `gameplay/actors/entity/`, `gameplay/interactables/`, `gameplay/building/`, `gameplay/props/`, `ui/main_menu|pause_menu|settings|hud|transitions|ending/`, `shaders/`, `assets/audio|models|sprites|fonts/`. Tuning: health3; anomalies1–6/empty30/Entity35; player3/6/gravity10/stamina100/25/15/1; cooldown5/2.5/6; noise5/14/20; Entity2.2/3.3/4.8, touch.8, proximity2.5, threshold40/100, hunt8, search12, echo6–14, vent2/6; jukebox10/100/radius28.

cards.title: Board maintenance and audit limitations
cards.description: Update audit commit/date whenever repo changes; verify code + scene integration before moving status; close checklist only after runtime tests; add anomalies by final names; keep proposals backlog/inferred; update numbers; rerun QA before release status. This is repository analysis, not a recorded playthrough: binary assets were referenced, not fully reviewed; absence claims are scoped to current default branch/main scene; nav, errors, mix, performance, visual framing, and export require Godot/Windows testing.
